title: Interactive demo: controller-typed prompt, live inference, rendered answer
emulator: PicoDrive (libretro, local build w/ memory-access patch + scripted input)
decoded: hello friend, the disc. the best word wins. the disc.
rendered_rows: HELLO FRIEND, THE DISC. THE BEST WORD WINS. THE DISC.
honesty_notes: Input was scripted through the headless harness (--press); the same UI works with a human on a real pad in any libretro frontend.
Emulator-only. Model cart-resident (CD streaming blocked on BIOS).
